basic_details.job_title: SVNIT Research Personnel Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.age_details: Max: 35 years for Project Associate-II and Project Associate-I
age_limit.details: Project Associate-II: Maximum 35 years Project Associate-I: Maximum 35 years

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech./M.E./M.Tech. (Electronics/Electronics & Communication/equivalent degree) with minimum aggregate First Class/CGPA 6.5 for all qualified degrees. For JRF, qualification in National Level eligibility test CSIR-UGC NET/GATE is required. For Project Associate-II and Project Associate-I, 2 years' experience in Research and Development is preferred for Project Associate-II.
qualification.details: Research Personnel (Junior Research Fellow): B.E./B.Tech./M.E./M.Tech. (Electronics/Electronics & Communication/equivalent degree), Qualified in National Level eligibility test CSIR-UGC NET/GATE Research Personnel (Project Associate-II): B.E./B.Tech. (Electronics/Electronics & Communication/or equivalent) And 2 years' experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and services Research Personnel (Project Associate-I): B.E./B.Tech. (Electronics/Electronics & Communication/ or equivalent)

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. (JRF), Rs. 35,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. (Project Associate-II with GATE/NET), Rs. 28,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. (Project Associate-II without GATE/NET), Rs. 31,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. (Project Associate-I with GATE/NET), Rs. 25,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. (Project Associate-I without GATE/NET)
salary_details.details: Research Personnel (Junior Research Fellow): Rs. 37,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. Research Personnel (Project Associate-II): With GATE/NET*: Rs. 35,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. Without GATE/NET*: Rs. 28,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. Research Personnel (Project Associate-I): With GATE/NET*: Rs. 31,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. Without GATE/NET*: Rs. 25,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SVNIT Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SVNIT Research Personnel recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 05-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Research Personnel posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech./M.E./M.Tech. in Electronics or equivalent. For JRF, a CSIR-UGC NET/GATE qualification is mandatory. Project Associate-II also requires 2 years of research experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Project Associate-II and Project Associate-I positions is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial application submission followed by an interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position?
faq.answer: The salary for the JRF position is Rs. 37,000/- per month, plus HRA at 20%.

faq.question: Q6. Are there different salary scales for Project Associate-II based on GATE/NET qualification?
faq.answer: Yes, Project Associate-II with GATE/NET will receive Rs. 35,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m., while those without will get Rs. 28,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email to [email protected].

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for Research Personnel at SVNIT?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for Research Personnel, distributed across Junior Research Fellow, Project Associate-II, and Project Associate-I posts.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category of candidates.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It contains comprehensive details about the recruitment.
